news.title: Hummus, hallo: het restaurant van kookboekenlegende Ottolenghi opent donderdag in Amsterdam - indebuurt.nl
news.summary:
# Summary

Ottolenghi, the renowned cookbook author and chef, is opening his first restaurant in Amsterdam this Thursday. The restaurant will serve his signature Mediterranean and Middle Eastern cuisine, particularly known for hummus and other Levantine dishes. Visitors to Amsterdam should care because Ottolenghi is a celebrated culinary figure, making this a noteworthy dining destination for fans of his cooking style and those seeking high-quality Mediterranean food.

news.title: Amsterdam cocktail week gaat groter dan ooit - Horecamagazine.nl
news.summary:
# Summary

Amsterdam Cocktail Week is expanding to its largest event yet, offering visitors and locals more cocktail bars and experiences than in previous years. This annual event showcases the city's thriving cocktail culture across multiple venues. If you're visiting Amsterdam, this is an ideal time to explore the city's best cocktail spots and discover new mixology trends.

news.title: Goed en betaalbaar eten voor iedereen: de bouillon is een succesvolle Parijse restaurantformule die rond 1900 ook in Amsterdam aansloeg – en die is nu weer terug - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

The article covers the return of "bouillon" restaurants to Amsterdam—a historic Parisian dining concept from around 1900 that emphasizes good food at affordable prices for everyone. These casual eateries were once popular in Amsterdam and are now making a comeback in the city. Visitors to Amsterdam would appreciate this news because it offers access to quality, budget-friendly dining options that combine historic charm with practical value.

news.title: Amsterdam verandert 10 dagen lang in cocktailhoofdstad tijdens Amsterdam Cocktail Week - Whisky Monkeys
news.summary:
# Summary

Amsterdam Cocktail Week transforms the city into a cocktail capital for 10 days, with Whisky Monkeys among the featured venues participating in the event. Visitors to Amsterdam during this period can enjoy special cocktail offerings and experiences across multiple bars and restaurants throughout the city. This is worth knowing if you're planning a trip and want to experience Amsterdam's cocktail scene at its peak with curated drinks and special promotions.

news.title: Restaurant Spectrum** in Amsterdam sluit eind mei 2026 - Entree Magazine
news.summary:
# Summary

Restaurant Spectrum** in Amsterdam will close at the end of May 2026. This closure affects one of the city's notable dining establishments, so visitors and locals should note the deadline if they want to experience the restaurant before it shuts down. Anyone planning a trip to Amsterdam in the coming months may want to prioritize dining there if it's on their list.

news.title: Beschimmeld voedsel en mensenhandel: stad Antwerpen sluit 2 handelspanden in Seefhoek - VRT
news.summary:
# Summary

The city of Antwerp has closed two commercial establishments in the Seefhoek neighborhood due to serious violations including moldy food and human trafficking concerns. Visitors to Antwerp should avoid these locations, as they posed significant health and safety risks. This closure highlights the importance of checking local health and safety alerts when dining out in the city.

news.title: ‘Blind gekocht’-expert Daan Alferink (31) opent binnenkort koffiebar in Antwerpen: “We hebben er zoveel zin in” - Nieuwsblad
news.summary:
# Summary

Daan Alferink, a 31-year-old "Blind gekocht" (Blind Taste Test) expert, is opening a new coffee bar in Antwerp soon. The venue promises to bring his expertise in evaluating food and beverages to a casual coffee setting. Visitors to Antwerp should watch for this opening, as it will offer a unique coffee experience from someone known for his discerning palate and food knowledge.

news.title: Broers openen deuren van restaurant Secreto op Vlaamsekaai: “Klanten worden bij ons meestal vrienden” - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

Two brothers have opened a new restaurant called **Secreto** on Vlaamsekaai, focusing on creating a warm, friend-like atmosphere with their customers. The restaurant emphasizes personal connections and hospitality as key to their dining experience. Visitors to the city would want to check it out for its welcoming, intimate vibe and the brothers' commitment to treating guests like friends rather than just customers.

news.title: KIJK. Sterrenchef opent nieuw gastronomisch restaurant De Aarde in voormalig huis van Jelle Van Riet en Helmut Lotti in Antwerpen - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

A Michelin-starred chef has opened a new gastronomic restaurant called **De Aarde** in Antwerp, Belgium, located in a historic building that was formerly owned by Belgian celebrities Jelle Van Riet and Helmut Lotti. Visitors to Antwerp should care because this represents a significant new fine dining option in the city, combining high-end gastronomy with a distinctive venue that carries local cultural significance.

While the article doesn't specify which restaurants were shut down, visitors to Antwerp should be aware that the city actively enforces food safety and public conduct standards.
